lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਤਨਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਸਚ ਘਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਓਤਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: tit tan mail na lagee sach ghar jis otaak |
lines.english: Filth does not stick to the body of one who has secured a dwelling in his True Home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਰ ਵਾਕਿ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo sabad pachhaaneeai saach rate gur vaak |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, they recognize the Dear Lord; through the Guru's Word, they are attuned to Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਕੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: nadar kare sach paaeeai bin naavai kiaa saak |5|
lines.english: When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, we obtain the True Name. Without the Name, who are our relatives? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸੇ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sach pachhaaniaa se sukhee jug chaar |
lines.english: Those who have realized the Truth are at peace throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jag meh laahaa ek naam paaeeai gur veechaar |6|
lines.english: In this world, the only real profit is the Name of the One Lord; it is earned by contemplating the Guru. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਕੈ ਸਚੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai trisanaa maar kai sach rakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: Subduing their egotism and desires, they keep the True Name enshrined in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਉ ਵਖਰੁ ਲਾਦੀਐ ਲਾਭੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: saachau vakhar laadeeai laabh sadaa sach raas |
lines.english: Loading the Merchandise of the True Name, you shall gather in your profits forever with the Capital of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਬੈਸਈ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਚੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: saachee daragah baisee bhagat sachee aradaas |
lines.english: In the Court of the True One, you shall sit in truthful devotion and prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚਾ ਊਚਉ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਹਉ ਨ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aoochaa aoochau aakheeai khau na dekhiaa jaae |
lines.english: The Lord is said to be the Highest of the High; no one can perceive Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਲੇਖਾ ਨਿਬੜੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: pat siau lekhaa nibarrai raam naam paragaas |7|
lines.english: Your account shall be settled with honor, in the Radiant Light of the Name of the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਏਕੁ ਤੂੰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh ek toon satigur deea dikhaae |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see only You. The True Guru has inspired me to see You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: jot nirantar jaaneeai naanak sehaj subhaae |8|3|
lines.english: The Divine Light within is revealed, O Nanak, through this intuitive understanding. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਸਿਆਣੀ ਸੋਹਣੀ ਕਿਉ ਕੀਤੋ ਵੇਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: at siaanee sohanee kiau keeto vesaahu |
lines.english: It was so clever and beautiful, but why was it so confident?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਛੁਲੀ ਜਾਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਸਰੁ ਖਾਰਾ ਅਸਗਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: machhulee jaal na jaaniaa sar khaaraa asagaahu |
lines.english: The fish did not notice the net in the deep and salty sea.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਇਉ ਸਿਰਿ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re iau sir jaanahu kaal |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, just like this, see death hovering over your own heads!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਛੀ ਤਿਉ ਮਾਣਸਾ ਪਵੈ ਅਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਾਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau machhee tiau maanasaa pavai achintaa jaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: People are just like this fish; unaware, the noose of death descends upon them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤੇ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਪਾਕੜੀ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਟਲੈ ਸਿਰਾਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: keete kaaran paakarree kaal na ttalai siraahu |1|
lines.english: By its actions it was caught, and now death cannot be turned away from its head. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਬਾਧੋ ਕਾਲ ਕੋ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਾਲੁ ਅਫਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag baadho kaal ko bin gur kaal afaar |
lines.english: The whole world is bound by death; without the Guru, death cannot be avoided.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਛੋਡਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sach rate se ubare dubidhaa chhodd vikaar |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to Truth are saved; they renounce duality and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਚਾਨੇ ਜਿਉ ਪੰਖੀਆ ਜਾਲੀ ਬਧਿਕ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: seechaane jiau pankheea jaalee badhik haath |
lines.english: Think of the hawk preying on the birds, and the net in the hands of the hunter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau tin kai balihaaranai dar sachai sachiaar |2|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who are found to be Truthful in the True Court. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹੋਰਿ ਫਾਥੇ ਚੋਗੈ ਸਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare hor faathe chogai saath |
lines.english: Those who are protected by the Guru are saved; the others are caught by the bait.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਚੁਣਿ ਸੁਟੀਅਹਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸੰਗੀ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin naavai chun sutteeeh koe na sangee saath |3|
lines.english: Without the Name, they are picked up and thrown away; they have no friends or companions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਸੂਚੇ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: man mukh sooche jaaneeeh guramukh jinaa giaan |4|
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh, and obtain spiritual wisdom-their minds and mouths are known to be pure. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਾ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sacho sachaa aakheeai sache sachaa thaan |
lines.english: God is said to be the Truest of the True; His Place is the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚਾ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sachaa maniaa tin man sach dhiaan |
lines.english: Those who obey the True One-their minds abide in true meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਅਗੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਦੇਇ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur agai aradaas kar saajan dee milaae |
lines.english: Offer your most sincere prayers to the True Guru, so that He may unite you with your Best Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹਉ ਵਸਾਂ ਨਾਉ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naavai andar hau vasaan naau vasai man aae |5|
lines.english: I dwell deep within the Name; the Name has come to dwell within my mind. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਮਦੂਤ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saajan miliai sukh paaeaa jamadoot mue bikh khaae |
lines.english: Meeting your Best Friend, you shall find peace; the Messenger of Death shall take poison and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee paragaas hoe sach rahai liv laae |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, you shall be enlightened; remain absorbed in the Love of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baajh guroo gubaar hai bin sabadai boojh na paae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness; without the Shabad, understanding is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਸੰਚਰੈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tithai kaal na sancharai jotee jot samaae |6|
lines.english: Death does not go there; your light shall merge with the Light. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee saalaaheeai ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we praise You; You have no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰਹੈ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਤੂੰ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: toonhai saajan toon sujaan toon aape melanahaar |
lines.english: You are my Best Friend; You are All-knowing. You are the One who unites us with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਅਪੜੈ ਜਿਥੈ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tithai kaal na aparrai jithai gur kaa sabad apaar |7|
lines.english: Death does not reach that place, where the Infinite Word of the Guru's Shabad resounds. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸਭੇ ਊਪਜਹਿ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee sabhe aoopajeh hukamee kaar kamaeh |
lines.english: By the Hukam of His Command, all are created. By His Command, actions are performed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਇਨਾ ਜੰਤਾ ਵਸਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੮॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak jo tis bhaavai so theeai inaa jantaa vas kichh naeh |8|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, whatever pleases His Will comes to pass. Nothing is in the hands of these beings. ||8||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਕਾਲੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee kaalai vas hai hukamee saach samaeh |
lines.english: By His Command, all are subject to death; by His Command, they merge in Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਜੂਠੈ ਤਨਿ ਜੂਠਿ ਹੈ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਜੂਠੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man jootthai tan jootth hai jihavaa jootthee hoe |
lines.english: If the mind is polluted, then the body is polluted, and the tongue is polluted as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:
